summary: Recording and performance details are largely absent; reviewers give little concrete information about this show.
review: The two reviews provide minimal insight into the actual concert recording. One reviewer leaves a cryptic comment with a zero‑star rating, while the other praises Bruce Hornsby’s playing at a different Philadelphia venue but does not address the sound or music of this specific Dead performance.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two reviews with vague, unrelated comments; one positive (4 stars) and one negative (0 stars) lead to an average rating around the middle of the scale.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer mentioned soundboard, audience mix, clarity, or any technical aspects of the audio.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No commentary on set structure or pacing was provided.
